onMembersChanged profile republish logic (MarmotContext) calls sendApplicationRumor when new member joins (count increases)
onMembersChanged profile republish logic (MarmotContext) does NOT call sendApplicationRumor when member count stays the same
onMembersChanged profile republish logic (MarmotContext) does NOT call sendApplicationRumor when a member is removed (count decreases)

onMembersChanged profile republish logic (MarmotContext) does NOT call sendApplicationRumor when re-joining after a removal does not exceed prior peak

subscribeToGroupMessages — Phase-2 live sub carries `since` covering Phase-1 gap captures an independent `since` anchor on each re-subscribe call
subscribeToGroupMessages — Phase-2 live sub carries `since` covering Phase-1 gap backdates the `since` anchor by a clock-skew safety margin
subscribeToWelcomes — receipt-handler integration valid kind-444 rumor → enqueuePendingInvitation called; joinGroupFromWelcome NOT called
subscribeToWelcomes — receipt-handler integration invalid Welcome (decryption failure) → silently dropped; enqueuePendingInvitation NOT called
listPendingInvitations returns an empty array when localStorage is empty
listPendingInvitations returns stored invitations
listPendingInvitations returns empty array on corrupt JSON
listPendingInvitations returns empty array on invalid array elements
enqueuePendingInvitation adds a new invitation
enqueuePendingInvitation is idempotent — re-adding the same id does not duplicate
enqueuePendingInvitation persists to localStorage (AC-INVITE-9)
enqueuePendingInvitation enforces per-inviter cap of 8 (AC-INVITE-3)
enqueuePendingInvitation enforces global cap of 256 (AC-INVITE-3)
enqueuePendingInvitation drops oldest per-inviter entry on per-inviter overflow
enqueuePendingInvitation emits to listeners (subscribe/getSnapshot reactivity)
removePendingInvitation removes an existing invitation
removePendingInvitation is idempotent when id does not exist
removePendingInvitation does not remove other invitations
removePendingInvitation emits to listeners after removal
countPendingInvitations returns 0 when empty
countPendingInvitations returns the correct count after multiple enqueues
pendingInvitationsForInviter returns 0 when no invitations from that inviter
pendingInvitationsForInviter counts only invitations from the specified inviter
localStorage persistence (AC-INVITE-9) survives a simulated page reload — data present in localStorage after write
enqueuePendingInvitation — global cap (AC-INVITE-3, distinct-inviter path) enforces global cap when each invite comes from a unique inviter (cap branch is exercised)
enqueuePendingInvitation — global cap (AC-INVITE-3, distinct-inviter path) drops the globally oldest entry (lowest receivedAt) when global cap fires
subscribe — unsubscribe stops future notifications (AC-REACT-6) unsubscribed listener is not called on subsequent mutations
fireAutoCommit (a) single pubkey → one commit call with Remove proposal + proposeUpdateMetadata
fireAutoCommit (b) empty leafIndexes → commit not called; onCommitted called to drop the stale entry
fireAutoCommit (c) two pubkeys → exactly one commit with two Remove proposals and correct remainingAdmins
fireAutoCommit commit failure → onCommitted not called; entries preserved for next timer cycle
fireAutoCommit burst of N pubkeys (AC-EDGE-3) → single commit absorbs all; pendingQueue is the full snapshot
fireAutoCommit mixed stale + valid → commit contains only valid Remove proposals; stale entries dropped
fetchDecryptedMedia returns cached bytes from mediaPersistence without calling blossomGet
fetchDecryptedMedia on cache miss: downloads, decrypts, caches, and returns bytes (not a URL)
fetchDecryptedMedia cache lookup uses fingerprint (sha256:nonce:version), not bare sha256
fetchDecryptedMedia forged attachment with same sha256 but different nonce does NOT replay cached plaintext
fetchDecryptedMedia dedupes concurrent fetches for the same key into a single download
fetchDecryptedMedia propagates BlossomNotFoundError so caller can map to not-found state
fetchDecryptedMedia propagates decrypt errors so caller can map to decrypt-failed state
fetchDecryptedMedia throws when group is not found

ObjectUrlSlot set() revokes the previous URL before creating a new one
ObjectUrlSlot revoke() releases the current URL and clears the slot
ObjectUrlSlot revoke() is safe to call when slot is empty
